title: Exemption Applications
content:
Exemption Applications

Dear Students,

The exemption applications for the Fall semester of 2024-2025 at our faculty will end on October 25, 2024. It is of great importance that you submit your exemption requests by this date. Applications submitted after October 25, 2024, will not be accepted.

We wish you success.
